pattern: Walking the sorted unique array, each maximal run of consecutive integers collapses into one range string, formatted as a single value or an arrow span.
hints: Consecutive integers in the sorted array belong to the same range; a gap starts a new one.
Track the start of the current run and extend it while each next value is exactly one more than the previous.
When the run ends, emit "start" if it is a single number or "start->end" otherwise, then begin the next run.

edge_inputs.description: single element is its own range
all consecutive collapse to one span

stress.description: sorted unique values built by random positive gaps so runs and breaks both occur
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randrange(0, min(size, 20) + 1)
    cur = rng.randrange(-1000, 1000)
    arr = []
    for _ in range(n):
        arr.append(cur)
        cur += rng.randrange(1, 4)
    return [arr]
stress.note: gaps of 1 make runs, larger gaps break them; values stay unique and sorted
